output.description: Output directory for the project. Optional but can be used to automatically find all the following folders inside of it, given they have the right default names.

root.description: Root directory for the project. Optional but can be used to automatically find all the following folders inside of it, given they have the right default names.

css.description: CSS directory. Required in case the folder name is not default.

pandoc-filters.description: Pandoc-filter directory. Required in case the folder name is not default.

fonts.description: Fonts directory. Required in case the folder name is not default.

graphs.description: Graphs directory. Required in case the folder name is not default.

js.description: JS directory. Required in case the folder name is not default.

meta.description: Meta directory. Required in case the folder name is not default.

graphics.description: Graphics directory. Required in case the folder name is not default.

references.description: References directory. Required in case the folder name is not default.

templates.description: Templates directory. Required in case the folder name is not default.

latex.description: Latex directory. Required in case the folder name is not default.
